title: Appliances, Functions, Storage, and Cloud Connectivity · Incident Repair Bay
summary: Design service paths across physical and virtual devices, private cloud networks, public services, and storage. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a labeled hybrid-service path and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare router, switch, firewall, access point, controller, proxy, load balancer, IDS, and IPS forwarding or inspection roles.
Compare NAS and SAN access models, protocols, traffic patterns, redundancy, and use cases.
Explain CDN, VPN, QoS, and TTL functions and how each changes delivery, privacy, priority, or loop lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
